title: Cave Diver Displacement
body: A cave diver enters a long underwater tunnel. At $$20$$ $$m$$ in, she drops her camera. She swims $$6$$ $$m$$ farther into the tunnel before noticing, then swims back $$10$$ $$m$$ before ending the dive. Taking the positive direction as out of the tunnel (toward the entry point), how far from the entry point is she, and what is her displacement vector relative to the entry point?
